headline: Former Barclays CEO Jes Staley agrees to July 23 interview about Jeffrey Epstein by Oversight panel
summary: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates is scheduled to be interviewed about his relationship to the sex offender Jeffrey Epstein in June.
